c++ -Wl,--as-needed -fstack-protector -fuse-ld=gold -Wl,--enable-new-dtags -pthread -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib -shared -Wl,-Bsymbolic-functions -Wl,-soname,libQt5Svg.so.5 -o libQt5Svg.so.5.5.1 .obj/qsvggraphics.o  .obj/qsvghandler.o  .obj/qsvgnode.o  .obj/qsvgstructure.o  .obj/qsvgstyle.o  .obj/qsvgfont.o  .obj/qsvgtinydocument.o  .obj/qsvgrenderer.o  .obj/qsvgwidget.o  .obj/qgraphicssvgitem.o  .obj/qsvggenerator.o  .obj/moc_qsvgwidget.o  -L/wrkdirs/usr/ports/graphics/qt5-svg/work/qtsvg-opensource-src-5.5.1/lib -L/usr/local/lib -lQt5Widgets -lQt5Gui -lQt5Core -lz -lGL
c++: error: invalid linker name in argument '-fuse-ld=gold'

Version 5.5.1
